title: ASR Outdoor Green Self Coiling Bike Lock 2 Keys Bicycle Cable Lock 6 Feet Long
description:
Secure your bike when not in use with the ASR Outdoor Bike Lock! This cable bike lock is designed to prevent your bike from being stolen if you need to lock it up outside. It’s super easy to use and comes with 2 identical keys as well as a holder to attach to your bike for convenience.

ASR Outdoor Green Self Coiling Bike Lock 2 Keys Bicycle Cable Lock 6 Feet Long

Secure your bike when not in use with the ASR Outdoor Bike Lock! This cable bike lock is designed to prevent your bike from being stolen if you need to lock it up outside. It’s super easy to use and comes with 2 identical keys as well as a holder to attach to your bike for convenience.

Key Features

  • SECURE YOUR BIKE - ASR Outdoor bike lock is designed to secure your bicycle when not in use; Super easy to use and comes with 2 identical keys and a holder to attach to your bike for convenience
  • STURDY CONSTRUCTION - Bike cable is made of plastic-covered heavy-duty braided metal cable that will keep your bike secured and help prevent it from being stolen; Comes in a bright green color
  • SELF-COILING DESIGN - ASR Outdoor bike lock features a useful self-coiling function so the cable doesn’t take up too much space once locked; Helps prevent tripping when locking and unlocking your bike
  • 6-FOOT CABLE - Bike lock features 6 feet of self-coiling cable so you can lock your bike up with leeway if necessary; Great cable lock option for any level of cycling
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: plastic, braided metal cable; Color: green; Comes with keys: yes (2 included); Length: 6 feet (1.83 meters); Self-coiling design

Product Specifications

  • MPN: CBLWTKGRN
  • UPC: 810131704490
  • Color: Green
  • Size: Medium

Our bike cable lock is made of plastic-covered heavy-duty braided metal cable that will keep your bike secured even with the toughest bike-cutting tools. It features a useful self-coiling design so the cable doesn’t get in your way once locked. It can also help prevent tripping when locking and unlocking your bike.

The bike lock features 6 feet of cable so you can lock your bike up with leeway if necessary, making this a great cable option for any level of cyclist.
